arts.ttl: The bizarre reason why Robin van Persie was snubbed by Tottenham before joining Arsenal
arts.sum: The reason behind Tottenham's decision to snub Robin van Persie (left) before he joined Arsenal has been revealed by former Spurs boss and sporting director David Pleat (inset).

arts.ttl: Tottenham XI vs Brighton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham travel to Brighton in the Premier League on Sunday looking for a sixth straight win in all competitions. Ange Postecoglou’s team have found their form in recent weeks, recovering from an unconvincing start to the campaign to turn their season around. After thrashing Manchester United 3-0 at Old Trafford last weekend, Spurs secured a […] The post Tottenham XI vs Brighton – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Brighton vs Tottenham predicted as Dominic Solanke scores again in impressive performance
arts.sum: Tottenham will be looking to keep up their winning form of late when they travel to the south coast to take on Brighton and Hove Albion in the Premier League. Spurs won the ball back from Brighton as the hosts threw bodies forward, allowing Postecoglou's side to hit the Seagulls on the break.

arts.ttl: Tottenham “feel proud” having beaten European giants to two top talents admits key Spurs man
arts.sum: Tottenham’s Technical Director Johan Lange has admitted that everyone at the club feels “proud” having beaten some of Europe’s biggest clubs to Lucas Bergvall and Radu Dragusin. The Premier League club signed both players during the January transfer window with Dragusin joining the North London outfit immediately from Genoa, while Bergvall would meet up with […] The post Tottenham “feel proud” having beaten European giants to two top talents admits key Spurs man appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Brighton vs Tottenham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: The two sides have shown their proficiency in the final third and vulnerabilities in their own box during the start of the 2024/25 season, although form favours Spurs ahead of their trip to the south coast. Fielding an insanely high line that Ange Postecoglou would have been proud of at Stamford Bridge last weekend, the Seagulls fell to a 4-2 defeat that leaves them without a Premier League victory since late August.

arts.ttl: 'I am worried': Jamie O'Hara now predicts if Tottenham can beat Brighton this afternoon
How to watch Brighton vs Tottenham - TV channel, kick-off time and live stream details - football.london
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are in Premier League action for the final time before the international break on Sunday afternoon when they face Brighton & Hove Albion. It could be another big afternoon for Spurs, so with that in mind, football.london brings you everything you need to know about following the game.

arts.ttl: Why Spurs' twin No 10s can thrive at Brighton
arts.sum: Swedish midfielder Kulusevski is a highly regarded creative talent for good reason, delivering 20 key passes already this season, including 15 from open play. Starting at Old Trafford with a central midfield containing Rodrigo Bentancur flanked by Kulusevski and Maddison would have been deemed too bold by many head coaches.

arts.ttl: Brighton vs Tottenham Hotspur – Match Preview and Team News
arts.sum: Tottenham travel to the South Coast this Sunday to face a Brighton side that will be looking to recover from their first defeat of the season last weekend. arts.ttl: Brest predicted XI v Le Havre: Abdallah Sima out, Pierre Lees-Melou returns
arts.sum: For the first time since the start of May, Pierre Lees-Melou has been included in the Stade Brestois squad, although he is not expected to start against Le Havre AC…
